name: Ghost Shaped Faux Shearling Halloween Throw Pillow Green - Hyde and EEK! Boutique™: Indoor Novelty Cushion, Polyester Fill
description:
Brighten up the look of your seasonal decor with the Ghost-Shaped Faux-Shearling Halloween Throw Pillow from Hyde and EEK! Boutique™. This green throw pillow is designed in the shape of a ghost with eyes and a smiling mouth for a cute look. Crafted with a faux-shearling exterior and 100% polyester filling, this novelty throw pillow adds decorative appeal to your creepy-season decor.

Hyde and EEK! Boutique™: Thrilling delights. Curious oddities.
